mapper.select:
SELECT id FROM `ar_report_data` rpd INNER JOIN (SELECT reportId, dataType, dataId, revenueConfirmType FROM (SELECT #{reportId} AS reportId, si.`dataId`, si.`dataType`, si.revenueConfirmType, si.`salesInId`, si.`deferredId`, si.`orderCode`, si.`projectName`, si.`contract`, si.`agentCode`, si.`agentName`, si.`secondChannel`, si.`secondChannelName`, si.`channelLevel`, si.`sapId`, si.`salesType`, si.`contractType`, si.`contractTypeCode`, si.`itemCode`, si.`itemModel`, si.`itemBigType`, si.`itemType`,
si.firstName, si.secondName, si.`mFirstName`, si.`mSecondName`, si.`mFirstName`, si.`mSecondName`, si.firstName, si.secondName,
si.`market`, IFNULL(si.`unitPrice`, 0), IFNULL(si.`quantity`, 0), IFNULL(si.`sumAmount`, 0), IFNULL(si.`outTaxAmount`, 0), IFNULL(si.`contractAmount`, 0), IFNULL(si.`directCost`, 0), IFNULL(si.`indirectCost`, 0), IFNULL(si.`supplyChainCost`, 0), IFNULL(si.`otherCost`, 0), IFNULL(si.`salesAfterCost`, 0), si.`accountPeriod`, si.`seasonPeriodId`, si.`dlvDate`, si.`incomeType`, si.`incomeTypeName`, IFNULL(si.`serviceOutsourcingCost`, 0), IFNULL(si.`prodCostDiff`, 0), IFNULL(si.`rebate`, 0), IFNULL(si.`customParam0`, 0), IFNULL(si.`customParam1`, 0), IFNULL(si.`customParam2`, 0), IFNULL(si.`customParam3`, 0), IFNULL(si.`customParam4`, 0), IFNULL(si.`customParam5`, 0), IFNULL(si.`customParam6`, 0), IFNULL(si.`customParam7`, 0), IFNULL(si.`customParam8`, 0), IFNULL(si.`customParam9`, 0), IFNULL(si.`spq`, 0), si.`orgId`,
si.orgName, c.compName as orgName,
si.deferredFlag, si.`deferredAccountPeriod`, si.`confirmAccountPeriod`, si.`deferredTypeName`, si.`confirmType` FROM
ar_salesin_revenue_merge si ar_salesin_revenue_export si left join t_company c on c.id = si.orgId
WHERE orgId = #{orgId} AND
#{item}
UNION SELECT si.reportId, si.`dataId`, si.`dataType`, si.revenueConfirmType, si.`salesInId`, si.`deferredId`, si.`orderCode`, si.`projectName`, si.`contract`, si.`agentCode`, si.`agentName`, si.`secondChannel`, si.`secondChannelName`, si.`channelLevel`, si.`sapId`, si.`salesType`, si.`contractType`, si.`contractTypeCode`, si.`itemCode`, si.`itemModel`, si.`itemBigType`, si.`itemType`, si.firstName, si.secondName, si.`mFirstName`, si.`mSecondName`, si.`market`, IFNULL(si.`unitPrice`, 0), IFNULL(si.`quantity`, 0), IFNULL(si.`sumAmount`, 0), IFNULL(si.`outTaxAmount`, 0), IFNULL(si.`contractAmount`, 0), IFNULL(si.`directCost`, 0), IFNULL(si.`indirectCost`, 0), IFNULL(si.`supplyChainCost`, 0), IFNULL(si.`otherCost`, 0), IFNULL(si.`salesAfterCost`, 0), si.`accountPeriod`, si.`seasonPeriodId`, si.`dlvDate`, si.`incomeType`, si.`incomeTypeName`, IFNULL(si.`serviceOutsourcingCost`, 0), IFNULL(si.`prodCostDiff`, 0), IFNULL(si.`rebate`, 0), IFNULL(si.`rsCustomParam0`, 0), IFNULL(si.`rsCustomParam1`, 0), IFNULL(si.`rsCustomParam2`, 0), IFNULL(si.`rsCustomParam3`, 0), IFNULL(si.`rsCustomParam4`, 0), IFNULL(si.`rsCustomParam5`, 0), IFNULL(si.`rsCustomParam6`, 0), IFNULL(si.`rsCustomParam7`, 0), IFNULL(si.`rsCustomParam8`, 0), IFNULL(si.`rsCustomParam9`, 0), IFNULL(si.`spq`, 0), si.`orgId`, si.orgName, si.deferredFlag, si.`deferredAccountPeriod`, si.`confirmAccountPeriod`, si.`deferredTypeName`, si.`confirmType` FROM `ar_report_data` si WHERE si.reportId = #{reportId} and si.state = 1) t GROUP BY reportId, dataType, dataId, revenueConfirmType HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) t ON t.reportId = rpd.`reportId` AND t.dataType = rpd.`dataType` AND t.dataId = rpd.`dataId` AND t.revenueConfirmType = rpd.revenueConfirmType

select * from ar_report_data_column_mapping where status = 1
AND FIND_IN_SET(#{reportType}, reportType)
mapper.insert: CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ${tempTableName} SELECT * from ${sourceTableName} limit 0;

CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE IF NOT EXISTS ${tempTableName}_data SELECT DISTINCT rpd.* FROM ${tempTableName} t INNER JOIN `ar_report_data` rpd ON
t.id = rpd.`id`
t.deferredId = rpd.`deferredId`
t.salesInId = rpd.`salesInId`
t.contract = rpd.`contract`
t.id = rpd.`id` OR ( (t.id = 0 OR t.id IS NULL) AND ( t.deferredId = rpd.`deferredId` OR ( (t.deferredId = 0 OR t.deferredId IS NULL) AND ( t.salesInId = rpd.`salesInId` OR ( (t.salesInId = 0 OR t.salesInId IS NULL) AND t.contract = rpd.`contract` ) ) ) ) )
WHERE t.reportId = rpd.`reportId`
mapper.update:
UPDATE ${tempTableName}_data rpd INNER JOIN ${tempTableName} t ON
t.id = rpd.`id`
t.deferredId = rpd.`deferredId`
t.salesInId = rpd.`salesInId`
t.contract = rpd.`contract`
t.id = rpd.`id` OR ( (t.id = 0 OR t.id IS NULL) AND ( t.deferredId = rpd.`deferredId` OR ( (t.deferredId = 0 OR t.deferredId IS NULL) AND ( t.salesInId = rpd.`salesInId` OR ( (t.salesInId = 0 OR t.salesInId IS NULL) AND t.contract = rpd.`contract` ) ) ) ) )
rpd.${column} = t.${column}
WHERE rpd.reportId = t.`reportId`
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM (SELECT * FROM ar_report_data rpd WHERE reportId = #{reportId} UNION SELECT * FROM ${tempTableName}_data) t GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(1) > 1

select count(1) from ${customField} rd
rd.${column.data} = #{model.${column.data}} AND
rd.${column.data} like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%")
